text:
There was once a young fox who had a brilliant red coat. He lived in a cozy hollow, where he loved to chat about the stars. One night, a wise owl listened as the fox regaled him with tales about old trees and distant galaxies.

One day, while dreaming of far-off galaxies, the fox dreamed of a distant land filled with big cats. He dreamt he met an owl of many colors, who whispered secrets about stars.

The next morning, the fox felt an urge to travel. After pondering long and hard, he decided to visit this mythical land.

He set off on a journey through endless woods. After days wandering, he found himself beside a lake. On the moonlit water, he saw a figure glide gracefully. It was a wise owl.

The owl looked at the fox earnestly. "There," it whispered mysteriously. "You already know everything there is to know about stars."

Overwhelmed with wisdom, the fox lay down on the grass.
